## Test plan

- [ ] `ruff check src/ tests/ main.py` passes

## Checklist
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] README / config docs updated if behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets in commits (`.env`, cookies, proxy credentials)
- [ ] Linked issue(s): Closes #
